tool_input.brief:
BRIEF (fork fork_moj9aqod_05ffb0, context_mode=brief):

Goal: Definitive fix for Coexist Excel sync - migrate any remaining unmigrated forms and ensure jobid 9 and 10 fire on schedule with the documented invariants intact.

**Architectural invariant:** Coexist is a multi-tenant platform. forms_migrated_at is the canonical migration cursor. Once forms_migrated_at is set on a row, that row is authoritative and the legacy Excel snapshot is read-only. Every row has tenant_id and is RLS-scoped. jobid 9 (forms migration) and jobid 10 (post-migration verification) are tenant-aware and must NEVER cross-tenant.

Acceptance criteria:
1. All forms with forms_migrated_at IS NULL get migrated under their correct tenant_id.
2. RLS policy on forms still enforced; no tenant-A admin can see tenant-B rows post-migration.
3. jobid 9 and jobid 10 run to completion in staging; poll Vercel READY status after the deploy of any code changes before declaring done.
4. Migration is idempotent - re-running does not duplicate or corrupt rows.

Doctrine pointers:
- ~/ecodiaos/patterns/coexist-excel-sync-invariants.md
- ~/ecodiaos/patterns/deploy-verify-or-the-fork-didnt-finish.md
- ~/ecodiaos/clients/coexist.md

Branch: fix/excel-sync-definitive-2026-04-29.
